contract.title: Refund ORD-17 and close TKT-17 without collateral changes

scenarios.name: False success
scenarios.claim: Refund and ticket closeout completed successfully.
scenarios.insight: The tool returned OK, but neither system changed.

observed.agentClaim: Refund and ticket closeout completed successfully.

scenarios.name: Partial commit
scenarios.claim: Refund ORD-17 for $42 has been issued as REF-17 and TKT-17 has been closed.
scenarios.insight: The refund exists, but TKT-17 is still open and not linked to it.

observed.agentClaim: Refund ORD-17 for $42 has been issued as REF-17 and TKT-17 has been closed.

scenarios.name: Wrong target
scenarios.claim: ORD-17 was refunded and its ticket was closed.
scenarios.insight: The refund points to ORD-99, and the unrelated order changed.

observed.agentClaim: ORD-17 was refunded and its ticket was closed.

scenarios.name: Duplicate retry
scenarios.claim: The retry was safe; the existing refund was reused.
scenarios.insight: The first run looks correct, but retry creates REF-18 and relinks the ticket.

observed.agentClaim: The retry was safe; the existing refund was reused.

scenarios.name: Timeout after commit
scenarios.claim: The upstream call timed out, so completion is uncertain.
scenarios.insight: The call timed out, but the ticket, ledger, and retry state are correct.

observed.agentClaim: The upstream call timed out, so completion is uncertain.

scenarios.name: Repaired run
scenarios.claim: ORD-17 is refunded, TKT-17 is closed, and retry is stable.
scenarios.insight: Ticket and ledger agree, unrelated records are untouched, and retry is stable.

observed.agentClaim: ORD-17 is refunded, TKT-17 is closed, and retry is stable.
